product_source.note: Paper covers both PPP-B2b and Galileo HAS but provides separate evaluations for each. Core=True justified by substantial PPP-B2b content and the NavDecoder toolbox.
grounding_quotes: The PPP-B2b service provided by BDS
BDS PPP-B2b offers superior positioning accuracy compared to Galileo HAS

experiment_epoch.note: Validation period not explicitly stated in accessible text. Toolbox paper — evaluation period likely described in later sections.

dcb_handling.note: Toolbox/decoding paper — DCB handling may be part of NavDecoder functionality but not explicitly described in the accessible text sections

mathematical_model.processing_mode: Forward Kalman filter (static PPP), combined forward+backward filter (kinematic PPP)
key_tools: NavDecoder Python toolbox for PPP-B2b and HAS decoding
grounding_quotes: A forward Kalman filter was employed for static PPP, while a combined forward and backward filter was used for kinematic PPP
using the root mean square (RMS) of signal-in-space range error as a metric, with final products from Wuhan University serving as a benchmark

metrics.positioning_accuracy: 0.1m with hourly PPP; 4-hour observation yields most significant improvements

main_results.summary: BDS PPP-B2b offers superior positioning accuracy compared to Galileo HAS. NavDecoder toolbox successfully decodes both PPP-B2b and HAS products. SISRE for BDS PPP-B2b: 0.67m, GPS PPP-B2b: 1.0m.
key_findings: Both products achieve 0.1m accuracy with hourly PPP
4-hour observation periods yield most significant accuracy improvements
NavDecoder provides first open-source tool for PPP-B2b and HAS decoding
grounding_quotes: The average RMS was found to be 1.0 m for GPS in PPP-B2b and 0.62 m for GPS in Galileo HAS
For BDS in PPP-B2b, the average RMS was 0.67 m, while for Galileo in HAS, it was 0.18 m
BDS PPP-B2b offers superior positioning accuracy compared to Galileo HAS

novelty_audit.rationale: First open-source Python toolbox (NavDecoder) for decoding both BDS PPP-B2b and Galileo HAS corrections. Addresses critical gap in PPP-B2b tooling. Provides archived data in ASCII format for evaluation.
grounding_quotes: we present a comprehensive Python toolbox called NavDecoder, which can decode both PPP-B2b and Galileo HAS products

reproduction_blockers: NavDecoder toolbox is open-source (Python) — this paper has better reproducibility than most
Raw GNSS observation data not provided
PPP-B2b correction archive not distributed with paper
Validation dataset configuration details not specified
